## 1. Free Business / Banking Counsel
**What it is:** Taylor offers himself as an ongoing advisor — business structure, banking, lending, operational finance. No cost. In exchange for Discord building advice from Dax.

**Dax's read:** Useful when questions come up. Low commitment. Take him up on it as needed, not on a schedule.

**Status:** Open

## 2. Business Banking
**What it is:** Taylor's digital bank (Wells Fargo-affiliated, no brick+mortar). Features: 1% cash back debit, instant payroll deposits for employees, zero-interest short-term loans against upcoming direct deposits. Taylor is sending links for Dax to review independently.

Taylor's own recommendation: have his bank AND a local physical bank — not either/or.

**Dax's read:** Worth researching when the links arrive. No pressure to commit. Dax currently has no business banking set up — this is one option.

**Status:** Pending review

## Taylor's Consulting Insight (Actionable for DD)
Taylor's observation that DD gives too much away for free is worth sitting with. Specifically: Dax's hands-on interaction with members — teaching, answering questions, building confidence — is premium behavior happening in free channels. Worth evaluating whether any of that engagement should be paywalled.

**Status:** Something to consider internally — no external dependency
